verdictReason: Physics loses by -13.19 pp NDCG@5 (95% CI -22.21..-4.44 pp, excludes 0). No query type gives physics an edge. Recommend removal.

classic.query: What was the first issue I had with my new car after its first service?
Which event did I attend first, the 'Effective Time Management' workshop or the 'Data Analysis using Python' webinar?
Which vehicle did I take care of first in February, the bike or the car?
Which device did I got first, the Samsung Galaxy S22 or the Dell XPS 13?
How many days before the team meeting I was preparing for did I attend the workshop on 'Effective Communication in the Workplace'?
How many days had passed between the Sunday mass at St. Mary's Church and the Ash Wednesday service at the cathedral?
How many days did it take for me to find a house I loved after starting to work with Rachel?
Which seeds were started first, the tomatoes or the marigolds?
How many days had passed between the Hindu festival of Holi and the Sunday mass at St. Mary's Church?
How many days before the 'Rack Fest' did I participate in the 'Turbocharged Tuesdays' event?
How many items of clothing do I need to pick up or return from a store?
How many projects have I led or am currently leading?
How many model kits have I worked on or bought?
How many days did I spend on camping trips in the United States this year?
How many weeks did it take me to watch all the Marvel Cinematic Universe movies and the main Star Wars films?
How many plants did I acquire in the last month?
How much total money have I spent on bike-related expenses since the start of the year?
How many hours in total did I spend driving to my three road trip destinations combined?
How many different doctors did I visit?
What time did I go to bed on the day before I had a doctor's appointment?
What was my personal best time in the charity 5K run?
How many Korean restaurants have I tried in my city?
Where did Rachel move to after her recent relocation?
What was the amount I was pre-approved for when I got my mortgage from Wells Fargo?
How often do I attend yoga classes to help with my anxiety?
Is my mom using the same grocery list method as me?
How many hours have I spent on my abstract ocean sculpture?
How many bikes do I currently own?
What day of the week do I take a cocktail-making class?
Where did I go on my most recent family trip?
Can you recommend some resources where I can learn more about video editing?
Can you suggest some accessories that would complement my current photography setup?
Can you recommend some recent publications or conferences that I might find interesting?
Can you suggest a hotel for my upcoming trip to Miami?
Can you recommend some interesting cultural events happening around me this weekend?
Can you recommend a show or movie for me to watch tonight?
Can you suggest some activities that I can do in the evening?
My kitchen's becoming a bit of a mess again. Any tips for keeping it clean?
I've been struggling with my slow cooker recipes. Any advice on getting better results?
I've been thinking about ways to stay connected with my colleagues. Any suggestions?
I'm checking our previous chat about the shift rotation sheet for GM social media agents. Can you remind me what was the rotation for Admon on a Sunday?
I'm planning to visit Bandung again and I was wondering if you could remind me of the name of that restaurant in Cihampelas Walk that serves a great Nasi Goreng?
I'm going back to our previous conversation about the children's book on dinosaurs. Can you remind me what color was the scaly body of the Plesiosaur in the image?
I'm planning to revisit Orlando. I was wondering if you could remind me of that unique dessert shop with the giant milkshakes we talked about last time?
Can you remind me of the name of the romantic Italian restaurant in Rome you recommended for dinner?
I remember you told me about the refining processes at CITGO's three refineries earlier. Can you remind me what kind of processes are used at the Lake Charles Refinery?
I'm planning my trip to Amsterdam again and I was wondering, what was the name of that hostel near the Red Light District that you recommended last time?
I think we discussed work from home jobs for seniors earlier. Can you remind me what was the 7th job in the list you provided?
In our previous chat, you suggested 'sexual compulsions' and a few other options for alternative terms for certain behaviors. Can you remind me what the other four options were?

I wanted to check back on our previous conversation about Netflix. I mentioned that I wanted to be able to access all seasons of old shows? Do you remember what show I used as an example, the one that only had the last season available?
What degree did I graduate with?
How long is my daily commute to work?
Where did I redeem a $5 coupon on coffee creamer?
What play did I attend at the local community theater?
What is the name of the playlist I created on Spotify?
What was my last name before I changed it?
Where do I take yoga classes?
What color did I repaint my bedroom walls?
When did I volunteer at the local animal shelter's fundraising dinner?
Where did I buy my new tennis racket from?
